items.title: 3 Keys To How 2026 Will Unfold

items.title: Why Q4 Earnings Season Could Be a Bullish Catalyst for S&P 500 Stocks
items.description: Expect broad S&P 500 earnings beats as Q4 2025 reports arrive, with tech, financials, and AI leaders like NVIDIA driving guidance, buybacks, and upside into 2026.

items.title: Why 2025’s Wild Ride Proves You Should Just Buy SPY and Chill
items.description: A Year of Extremes Highlights the Power of Passive Strategies 2025 was not a normal year for stocks. Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA), the AI leader that dominated returns in prior years, has posted a solid but relatively modest gain of around 41% — a “bad” year by its recent standards. Yet standout performers emerged elsewhere: SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK), ... Why 2025’s Wild Ride Proves You Should Just Buy SPY and Chill
